name: 3-Day Tour: Marrakech → Sahara → Fes via Dades & Merzouga

seo.title: 3-Day Marrakech to Fes Tour via the Sahara — Merzouga, Dades, Todra | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 3-day tour from Marrakech to Fes: Ait Ben Haddou (UNESCO), Dades Gorges, Todra Gorges, Merzouga desert (Erg Chebbi). Night under the Sahara stars.

hero.tagline: From the mountains to the desert: Marrakech → Merzouga → Fes

intro: This 3-day tour connects Marrakech to Fes through Morocco's most spectacular landscapes: the Tizi n'Tichka pass, the ksar of Ait Ben Haddou, the Dades Valley, the Todra Gorges and the golden dunes of Erg Chebbi in Merzouga. Perfect for discovering southern Morocco before heading north to the imperial city of Fes.
